news.title:
ICICI Lombard received a GST demand order of ₹31.2 crore for 2017-2024.
Bombay HC granted a stay on the demand; no immediate financial impact reported.
news.summary:
ICICI Lombard received a GST demand order of ₹31.2 crore for 2017-2024.
Bombay HC granted a stay on the demand; no immediate financial impact reported.

news.title:
ICICI Lombard may see outflows of $66M due to Nifty semi-annual rejig.
Market flows turn cautious as reshuffle impacts broader indices.
news.summary:
ICICI Lombard may see outflows of $66M due to Nifty semi-annual rejig.
Market flows turn cautious as reshuffle impacts broader indices.

news.title:
ICICI Lombard to hold board meeting on April 15, 2026, to approve FY26 audited results.
Trading window closed April 1-17, 2026, for financial results and potential final dividend.
news.summary:
ICICI Lombard to hold board meeting on April 15, 2026, to approve FY26 audited results.
Trading window closed April 1-17, 2026, for financial results and potential final dividend.

news.title:
ICICI Lombard acquired 0.05% stake in HDFC Bank for ₹0.39B.
The investment is part of normal operations and not a related party transaction.
news.summary:
ICICI Lombard acquired 0.05% stake in HDFC Bank for ₹0.39B.
The investment is part of normal operations and not a related party transaction.

news.title:
General insurance industry grew 10% in February; ICICI Lombard rose 18%.
New India Assurance up 2%, Go Digit up 19% in February.
news.summary:
General insurance industry grew 10% in February; ICICI Lombard rose 18%.
New India Assurance up 2%, Go Digit up 19% in February.

news.title:
ICICI Lombard acquired 0.03% equity in Reliance Industries for ₹0.40B in cash.
The investment was made in multiple tranches as part of its routine function.
news.summary:
ICICI Lombard acquired 0.03% equity in Reliance Industries for ₹0.40B in cash.
The investment was made in multiple tranches as part of its routine function.

news.title:
AM Best affirmed ICICI Lombard's Financial Strength Rating at B and Long Term Issuer Credit Rating at bbb.
Outlook shifted to positive, citing a stronger balance sheet and robust capital management.
news.summary:
AM Best affirmed ICICI Lombard's Financial Strength Rating at B and Long Term Issuer Credit Rating at bbb.
Outlook shifted to positive, citing a stronger balance sheet and robust capital management.

news.title:
January saw a 15% YoY rise in general insurance premiums, led by Go Digit's 34% growth.
ICICI Lombard grew 16% YoY; Bajaj Allianz saw a 9% increase. Health insurers led with 25% growth.
news.summary:
January saw a 15% YoY rise in general insurance premiums, led by Go Digit's 34% growth.
ICICI Lombard grew 16% YoY; Bajaj Allianz saw a 9% increase. Health insurers led with 25% growth.

news.title:
ICICI Lombard executed a block trade of ~100,073 shares at Rs. 1854.
The total transaction value for the block trade amounted to Rs. 18.55 crore.
news.summary:
ICICI Lombard executed a block trade of ~100,073 shares at Rs. 1854.
The total transaction value for the block trade amounted to Rs. 18.55 crore.

news.title:
Bombay HC grants temporary stay on ICICI Lombard's GST demand of ₹17.3B and penalty of ₹1.7B.
No immediate financial impact on ICICI Lombard due to the stay.
news.summary:
Bombay HC grants temporary stay on ICICI Lombard's GST demand of ₹17.3B and penalty of ₹1.7B.
No immediate financial impact on ICICI Lombard due to the stay.

news.title: ICICI Lombard General Insurance faces 17.29B INR tax demand, 1.73B INR penalty.
news.summary: ICICI Lombard General Insurance faces 17.29B INR tax demand, 1.73B INR penalty.

news.title:
New Labour Codes of Nov 2025 increased employee costs for private banks, insurers.
Higher operating expenses reported in Q3FY26 due to statutory impact of these codes.
news.summary:
New Labour Codes of Nov 2025 increased employee costs for private banks, insurers.
Higher operating expenses reported in Q3FY26 due to statutory impact of these codes.

news.title:
ICICI Lombard witnessed an NSE block trade of ~100,005 shares at Rs. 1850.9.
The total transaction value of the block trade was Rs. 18.5 crores.
news.summary:
ICICI Lombard witnessed an NSE block trade of ~100,005 shares at Rs. 1850.9.
The total transaction value of the block trade was Rs. 18.5 crores.

news.title: ICICI Lombard reports a weak Q3 but narrows gap in motor segment.
news.summary: ICICI Lombard reports a weak Q3 but narrows gap in motor segment.

news.title:
ICICI Lombard reports underwriting loss up 132%, operating profit down 17%, and PAT down 9%.
Despite 42% rise in investment income, motor and retail health losses rose 137% and 135%, respectively.
news.summary:
ICICI Lombard reports underwriting loss up 132%, operating profit down 17%, and PAT down 9%.
Despite 42% rise in investment income, motor and retail health losses rose 137% and 135%, respectively.

news.title:
Goldman Sachs maintains Neutral rating for ICICI Lombard.
Target price for ICICI Lombard reduced to 1,925.
news.summary:
Goldman Sachs maintains Neutral rating for ICICI Lombard.
Target price for ICICI Lombard reduced to 1,925.

news.title:
HSBC maintains a buy rating on ICICI Lombard with a target of ₹2,285.
It expects market share growth, 18-20% RoE, and adjusts FY26-28 earnings estimates.
news.summary:
HSBC maintains a buy rating on ICICI Lombard with a target of ₹2,285.
It expects market share growth, 18-20% RoE, and adjusts FY26-28 earnings estimates.

news.title:
Key stocks in focus: ICICI Lombard, Tata Elxsi, Endurance Technologies, NLC India, Paytm, Just Dial, Infosys, and Indian Overseas Bank.
ICICI Lombard Q3 net profit down 9.1% at Rs. 659 crore; Tata Elxsi EBIT up 17.4% QoQ; Just Dial revenue up 0.9% QoQ.
news.summary:
Key stocks in focus: ICICI Lombard, Tata Elxsi, Endurance Technologies, NLC India, Paytm, Just Dial, Infosys, and Indian Overseas Bank.
ICICI Lombard Q3 net profit down 9.1% at Rs. 659 crore; Tata Elxsi EBIT up 17.4% QoQ; Just Dial revenue up 0.9% QoQ.

news.title:
ICICI Lombard's Q3 profits missed expectations with pressured operations.
Tata Elxsi and ICICI Lombard had contrasting results; traders advised caution.
news.summary:
ICICI Lombard's Q3 profits missed expectations with pressured operations.
Tata Elxsi and ICICI Lombard had contrasting results; traders advised caution.

news.title:
ICICI Lombard aims for 18-20% ROAE, focusing on profitable growth.
The company emphasizes digital expansion to achieve its targets.
news.summary:
ICICI Lombard aims for 18-20% ROAE, focusing on profitable growth.
The company emphasizes digital expansion to achieve its targets.
